changes.old: Greet caller; identify if emergency. Emergencies (just... waits...): collect name, number, address → transfer to on-call technician; if transfer fails after 60s, assure callback within 10 min. Non-emergencies: collect name, number, issue → confirm next-business-day callback.
changes.new: Greet caller; identify if emergency. Emergencies (types — sprinkler head discharge, fire alarm connected to suppression...): collect name, number, address → transfer to 480-555-0144; if transfer fails after 45s, assure callback within 10 min. Non-emergencies: collect name, number, issue → confirm next-business-day callback.

changes.old: Office open Monday - Friday business hours start–business hours end Mst. Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name & number. Emergencies → transfer to on-call technician. Non-emergencies → route to main office line. Wrap-up confirm next steps.
changes.new: Office open Monday - Friday 7 AM–3:30 PM Mst. Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name & number. Emergencies → transfer to 480-555-0144. Non-emergencies → route to main office line. Wrap-up confirm next steps.
